sections.paragraph:
παραβουλεύομαι 1 aor. παρεβουλευσάμην (Cat. Cod. Astr. XII 188, 27; Hesych., prob. w. ref. to Phil 2:30) be careless τινί in relation to someth. τῇ ψυχῇ have no concern for one’s life Phil 2:30 v.l. (for παραβολ. q.v.).—DELG s.v. βούλομαι.

aor. aor. = aorist

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

prob. prob. = probable, probably

ref. ref. = reference(s)

someth. someth. = something

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 760
